sourcePack.selectionStandard: approved-subset-only; missing art is preferred to bad art
sourcePack.objectSelectionStandard: strict/relaxed curated backup assets plus approved premium bg_output pass; premium objects are preferred, backup objects remain fallback, and deleted backup PNGs stay removed
sourcePack.legacyAtlasV3Selection: Restored atlas_v3 semantic mask source cells for water, sand, and snow after current material fill regression.

missingRuntimeRoles.notes: Premium transparent POI assets from objects_premium_v2 are preferred first when visually appropriate, then objects_premium, then src/assets/world/current/objects as backup/fallback.
Compact settlement, city, castle, and harbor compositions from the relaxed pass are valid POI objects and now drive key town/harbor/location mappings.
Strict approved broadleaf, jungle, pine, and autumn forest patches remain active. A true snow-covered pine cluster is still missing.
Roads and rivers render from packed-dirt and freshwater terrain assets through semantic terrain masks. Route/dock/bridge keys point to existing current object PNGs.

missingRuntimeRoles.role: shipwreck and dedicated Starfall Gate sprites
missingRuntimeRoles.notes: Shipwreck uses an existing boat object as a runtime fallback. Starfall Gate remains mapped to the existing clean portal until a stronger dedicated gate is curated.
